scripts.dev: concurrently -n web,api -c yellow,cyan "vite dev" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build:itch: ITCH=1 VITE_API_URL=${VITE_API_URL:-https://wheel-of-fate-f7b596f2e07d.herokuapp.com} vite build && find build/images -mindepth 1 -maxdepth 1 ! -name rank_badges_bundle -exec rm -rf {} + && node scripts/rewrite-itch-paths.mjs
scripts.package:itch: npm run build:itch && VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && SHA=$(git rev-parse --short HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo nogit) && ZIP="wheel-of-destiny-itch-v${VERSION}-${SHA}.zip" && rm -f wheel-of-destiny-itch-v*.zip wheel-of-fate-itch-v*.zip wheel-of-fate-itch.zip wheel-of-destiny-itch.zip && cd build && zip -qr "../${ZIP}" . && cd .. && echo "Wrote ${ZIP} ($(du -h ${ZIP} | cut -f1))"
